notes: Release tooling records bundled binary checksums in SHA256SUMS.txt at package time.
Keep source_url and license fields current whenever dependency versions change.

dependencies.name: ffmpeg
dependencies.license: LGPL-2.1-or-later or GPL-2.0-or-later depending on selected build flags
dependencies.download_note: Use a pinned platform build or build from source before running release/package.ps1.

dependencies.name: ltc-tools
dependencies.version: 0.7.0 for Windows CI build; pinned by platform preparation step elsewhere
dependencies.download_note: Windows CI builds ltcdump from the v0.7.0 source tag before running release/package.ps1.

dependencies.name: libltc
provides: runtime support for ltc-tools builds when dynamically linked
dependencies.version: 1.3.2 for Windows CI build; pinned by platform preparation step elsewhere
dependencies.download_note: Windows CI builds libltc from the v1.3.2 release tarball and bundles the runtime DLL when required.
